seoTitle: Koonda vs Koondrook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Koonda and Koondrook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Koonda and Koondrook.
heading: Koonda vs Koondrook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Koonda, Victoria and Koondrook, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Koonda has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Koondrook (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Koonda or Koondrook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Koonda has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Koondrook scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Koonda scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Koondrook scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Koonda or Koondrook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Koonda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
